description: Wines identified as undervalued - where actual price is significantly below predicted price based on quality metrics
methodology: Undervalued score = (Predicted Price - Actual Price) / Actual Price * 100

undervalued_wines.title: Ponzi 2014 Pinot Noir (Willamette Valley)
undervalued_wines.description: Elegant and complex with cherry, earth and spice notes

undervalued_wines.title: Ravenswood 2015 Old Vine Zinfandel (Sonoma Valley)
undervalued_wines.description: Rich, intense blackberry and pepper with smooth tannins

undervalued_wines.title: Château Smith Haut Lafitte 2012 (Pessac-Léognan)
undervalued_wines.description: Exceptional depth with cassis, tobacco and mineral notes

undervalued_wines.title: Marqués de Murrieta 2010 Reserva (Rioja)
undervalued_wines.description: Classic Rioja with leather, cherry and vanilla complexity

undervalued_wines.title: Leeuwin Estate 2015 Art Series Chardonnay (Margaret River)
undervalued_wines.description: Luminous citrus and stone fruit with creamy texture

undervalued_wines.title: Tablas Creek 2016 Esprit de Tablas (Paso Robles)
undervalued_wines.description: Elegant GSM blend with dark fruit and herbal complexity

undervalued_wines.title: Weingut Keller 2015 Riesling (Rheinhessen)
undervalued_wines.description: Brilliant acidity with stone fruit and mineral drive

undervalued_wines.title: Catena Zapata 2014 Malbec (Mendoza)
undervalued_wines.description: Deep purple with black fruit and violet aromatics

undervalued_wines.title: Domaine Faiveley 2014 Gevrey-Chambertin (Burgundy)
undervalued_wines.description: Classic Burgundian elegance with red berry and earth

undervalued_wines.title: Kanonkop 2015 Paul Sauer (Stellenbosch)
undervalued_wines.description: Structured and age-worthy with cassis and cedar
